Start building

Enterprise APIs

Introducing our Priority Tier APIs, including regional data processing controls, system-level SLAs, and increased rate limits. This service is best for production workloads that require predictable cost and performance. Priority Tier APIs are priced starting at 75% above list pricing. Contact sales for more information.

Contact sales

Browse our APIs.

Cutting-edge AI models across text, reasoning, vision, and more — ready to integrate into your workflows with minimal coding.

    Agent API

    Tools

    Enhances AI with built-in tools for code execution, web search, image generation, persistent memory, and agentic orchestration.

    • Price

      Model cost per M token + Tool call

    Libraries

    Tools

    Upload and manage documents, enabling agents to access your external data.

    • OCR

      $3/1K pages

    • Indexing

      $1/per M tokens

    • Call

      $0.01 /per call

    Code execution

    Tools

    Execute and interpret code snippets within the chat interface.

    • Price

      $30 / 1000 calls

    Web search

    Tools

    Enhance your work, research, and learning with web search, complete with citations for accurate and up-to-date information.

    • Price

      $30 / 1000 calls

    Images

    Tools

    Generate images based on user prompts and preferences.

    • Price

      $100 / 1000 images

    Premium news

    Tools

    Access to news articles via integrated news provider verification for enhanced information retrieval.

    • Price

      $50 / 1000 calls

    Data capture

    Tools

    Easily record and access API call data for debugging and continuous optimization.

    • Price

      $0.04 /M tokens

    Mixtral 8x22B

    Text-to-text

    Mixtral 8x22B is currently the most performant open model. A 22B sparse Mixture-of-Experts (SMoE). Uses only 39B active parameters out of 141B.

    • Output (/M tokens)
